message:
fix: navbar dropdowns hidden behind mission sidebar, tooltip show delay, dashboard padding symmetry (#9464)

- Add TOOLTIP_SHOW_DELAY_MS (250ms) constant to prevent tooltip flicker
- Apply show delay to InfoPopover in TreeNodeItem (hover with setTimeout)
- Raise navbar dropdown z-indexes from z-50/z-dropdown to z-toast (500)
  so Learn, alerts, and search render above the mission sidebar (z-modal 400)
- Add symmetric right margin (SIDEBAR_CONTROLS_OFFSET_PX) to main content
  so dashboard left and right borders are visually equal

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
